themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 18 verses. Commentary leans on "And in the fifth year of Joram the son of Ahab king of Israel, Jehoshaphat being then king of...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".

themes.label: Covenant

Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "Yet the LORD would not destroy Judah for David his servant's sake, as he promised him to give...".
